text:
Perfect! 

## ✅ Base Logo Updated

### Changes Made:
- **Updated all chain logos** to use DeFi Llama's icon service
- **Base logo** now shows the latest branding (blue gradient logo)
- All other chain logos also updated to latest versions

### New Chain Logo Source:
**DeFi Llama Icons** - `https://icons.llamao.fi/icons/chains/`
- ✅ Latest branding for all chains
- ✅ HTTPS compliant
- ✅ Optimized WebP format
- ✅ Consistent sizing

### Updated Logos:
- **Ethereum** → Latest Ethereum logo
- **Base** → New Base logo (blue gradient) ✨
- **Arbitrum** → Latest Arbitrum logo
- **Polygon** → Latest Polygon logo
- **Optimism** → Latest Optimism logo

The Base logo will now display with the updated branding!
